title: Schema migration pipeline for templates (schema_version is a promise)
description: Templates carry schema_version (now at 3.1) but there is no formal migrator — old templates get hand-rewritten or break silently. Introduce src/features/templates/migrations/ with pure functions v2_to_v3(spec), v3_to_v3_1(spec), etc., and a loader that auto-upgrades any template on read. Add a CI check that every schema_version bump ships with a migrator plus round-trip test. Record the applied-migration chain on the persona record so adopted personas can re-migrate when their source template advances.
reasoning: Without migrations, schema_version is decorative and each bump creates a flag day across 107 files and every user's adopted personas. A formal migration pipeline turns schema evolution from a risk into routine shipment, and enables users' adopted personas to pick up schema improvements the way SQL migrations bring running systems forward.
